sources.title: Emergency Fund Basics: How Much You Need & Where to Keep It
key_points: Life has a way of throwing [music]

sources.title: Top 8 Practical Steps To Build An Emergency Fund The Right Way (2026)
key_points: Do you feel like unexpected expenses
always show up at the wrong time? Where
there's a sudden medical bill, a job

sources.title: THE 6 MONTH EMERGENCY FUND: WHY IT EXISTS AND WHERE TO KEEP IT!!
key_points: Most people who lose their job don't
panic on day one. They panic on day 93.
That's when the severance runs out, when

carousels.concept: The emergency fund is a countdown timer, not a virtue

slides_en.headline: Your emergency fund is a timer.
slides_en.body: Most people find out on day 93.
slides_en.visual_direction: Dramatic skyline with warm gold backlight. High contrast, cinematic. The image carries weight; text sits lower-left with generous breathing room.

slides_en.headline: Severance runs out. Bills don't.
slides_en.body: The median job search takes 3 to 5 months. Half take longer.
slides_en.visual_direction: Clean overhead notebook/budget composition. Dark navy overlay. Low-key, lots of negative space. Text anchored upper-left.

slides_en.headline: Six months isn't arbitrary.
slides_en.body: It's the buffer between selective and desperate. Enough time to find the right job, not the first one.
slides_en.visual_direction: Warm textural close-up of cash and ledger. Navy gradient overlay to deepen contrast. Large gold '01' marker top-right.

slides_en.headline: Unemployment makes expenses grow.
slides_en.body: COBRA premiums. Interview costs. Stress spending. Six months of expenses is really closer to four.
slides_en.visual_direction: Desk scene with laptop and scattered cash, darkened. Warmer tone than slide 3. Gold '02' marker top-right for rhythm.

slides_en.headline: Cash in checking slowly dies.
slides_en.body: Inflation eats 3% a year. A mattress fund loses a third of itself over a decade.
slides_en.visual_direction: Conceptual: stacks of cash under warm low light, shadowed edges. Feels different from earlier slides — moodier, more abstract. Text bottom-left.

slides_en.headline: High-yield savings. Boring on purpose.
slides_en.body: FDIC insured. Liquid in a day. Earning 4%+ instead of zero. Boring is the feature.
slides_en.visual_direction: Calculator, pen, cash — clean, resolved composition. Even light. Feels like the tension has released. Text upper-left.

slides_en.headline: Save this before you need it.
slides_en.body: Money explained like math, not morality. Follow @personalfinancetips for one carousel a week.
slides_en.visual_direction: Solid deep navy. No photography. Gold CTA button bottom-left with handle. Quiet, resolved, brand-forward.

slides_he.headline: קרן החירום שלך היא שעון עצר.
slides_he.body: רוב האנשים מגלים את זה ביום ה־93.
slides_he.visual_direction: Dramatic skyline with warm gold backlight. High contrast, cinematic. The image carries weight; text sits lower-left with generous breathing room.

slides_he.headline: פיצויים נגמרים. חשבונות לא.
slides_he.body: חיפוש עבודה לוקח בממוצע 3 עד 5 חודשים. לחצי מהאנשים יותר.
slides_he.visual_direction: Clean overhead notebook/budget composition. Dark navy overlay. Low-key, lots of negative space. Text anchored upper-left.

slides_he.headline: שישה חודשים זה לא מספר רנדומלי.
slides_he.body: זה המרווח בין לבחור עבודה לבין להתחנן לאחת. מספיק זמן למצוא את הנכונה, לא את הראשונה.
slides_he.visual_direction: Warm textural close-up of cash and ledger. Navy gradient overlay to deepen contrast. Large gold '01' marker top-right.

slides_he.headline: כשאין עבודה, ההוצאות גדלות.
slides_he.body: ביטוח בריאות פרטי. הוצאות על ראיונות. קניות מלחץ. שישה חודשי הוצאות מתכווצים לארבעה.
slides_he.visual_direction: Desk scene with laptop and scattered cash, darkened. Warmer tone than slide 3. Gold '02' marker top-right for rhythm.

slides_he.headline: כסף בעובר ושב פשוט מת.
slides_he.body: האינפלציה אוכלת 3% בשנה. קרן מתחת למזרן מאבדת שליש מעצמה בעשור.
slides_he.visual_direction: Conceptual: stacks of cash under warm low light, shadowed edges. Feels different from earlier slides — moodier, more abstract. Text bottom-left.

slides_he.headline: פיקדון יומי. משעמם בכוונה.
slides_he.body: מבוטח בבנק. נזיל תוך יום. מרוויח 4% במקום אפס. השעמום הוא היתרון.
slides_he.visual_direction: Calculator, pen, cash — clean, resolved composition. Even light. Feels like the tension has released. Text upper-left.

slides_he.headline: תשמור את זה לפני שתצטרך אותו.
slides_he.body: כסף מוסבר כמו מתמטיקה, לא כמו מוסר. עקבו אחרי @personalfinancetips לקרוסלה אחת בשבוע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Solid deep navy. No photography. Gold CTA button bottom-left with handle. Quiet, resolved, brand-forward.

carousels.concept: Build the fund in small, compounding steps

slides_en.headline: Don't save six months. Save one week.
slides_en.body: The order is what actually builds the fund.
slides_en.visual_direction: Overhead desk scene with cash, coins, laptop. Warm gold highlights. High contrast, scroll-stopping. Text bottom-left.

slides_en.headline: The goal is too big to start.
slides_en.body: Six months of expenses sounds like a house. Nobody starts a house with the roof.
slides_en.visual_direction: Clean notebook and budget chart, navy overlay. Minimal composition, generous white space around the headline.

slides_en.headline: Hit $500 before anything else.
slides_en.body: Small win, fast. Enough to survive a car repair without a credit card. Momentum is the real asset.
slides_en.visual_direction: Close-up of cash, calculator, pen, wooden arrow. Warm tones. Gold '01' top-right. Text left-aligned.

slides_en.headline: Automate it and forget it.
slides_en.body: Direct debit on payday. Fifty dollars you never see is fifty dollars you never spend.
slides_en.visual_direction: Cash bundle, gold dollar sign, pen on ledger. Cooler than slide 3 for contrast. Gold '02' top-right.

slides_en.headline: Your income isn't the target.
slides_en.body: Six months of expenses, not six months of salary. Most people calculate the wrong number and quit halfway.
slides_en.visual_direction: Conceptual city skyline with rising chart. High drama, warm gold. Feels different from the practical slides before it — the reframe hits here.

slides_en.headline: Emergency fund buys you time.
slides_en.body: Not wealth. Not status. Just the one thing you can't borrow when the bill arrives.
slides_en.visual_direction: Hand writing over a budget with coins and cash. Resolved, quiet, warm. Text left-aligned with generous space.

slides_en.headline: Save this. Then start step one.
slides_en.body: Money explained like math, not morality. Follow @personalfinancetips for one carousel a week.
slides_en.visual_direction: Solid deep navy. No photography. Gold CTA button with handle, bottom-left. Clean and quiet.

slides_he.headline: אל תחסוך לחצי שנה. תחסוך לשבוע.
slides_he.body: הסדר הוא מה שבונה את הקרן.
slides_he.visual_direction: Overhead desk scene with cash, coins, laptop. Warm gold highlights. High contrast, scroll-stopping. Text bottom-left.

slides_he.headline: המטרה גדולה מדי בשביל להתחיל.
slides_he.body: שישה חודשי הוצאות נשמעים כמו בית שלם. אף אחד לא בונה בית מהגג.
slides_he.visual_direction: Clean notebook and budget chart, navy overlay. Minimal composition, generous white space around the headline.

slides_he.headline: תגיע ל־2,000 ש״ח קודם כל.
slides_he.body: ניצחון קטן, מהיר. מספיק בשביל לשרוד פאנצ׳ר בלי להיכנס לאוברדראפט. התאוצה היא הנכס האמיתי.
slides_he.visual_direction: Close-up of cash, calculator, pen, wooden arrow. Warm tones. Gold '01' top-right. Text left-aligned.

slides_he.headline: הוראת קבע. ותשכח מזה.
slides_he.body: הוראת קבע ביום המשכורת. 200 ש״ח שלא ראית הם 200 ש״ח שלא תבזבז.
slides_he.visual_direction: Cash bundle, gold dollar sign, pen on ledger. Cooler than slide 3 for contrast. Gold '02' top-right.

slides_he.headline: המשכורת היא לא היעד.
slides_he.body: שישה חודשי הוצאות, לא שישה חודשי משכורת. רוב האנשים מחשבים את המספר הלא נכון ונשברים באמצע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Conceptual city skyline with rising chart. High drama, warm gold. Feels different from the practical slides before it — the reframe hits here.

slides_he.headline: קרן חירום קונה לך זמן.
slides_he.body: לא עושר. לא סטטוס. רק את הדבר שאי אפשר ללוות כשהחשבון מגיע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Hand writing over a budget with coins and cash. Resolved, quiet, warm. Text left-aligned with generous space.

slides_he.headline: תשמור. ותתחיל מהצעד הראשון.
slides_he.body: כסף מוסבר כמו מתמטיקה, לא כמו מוסר. עקבו אחרי @personalfinancetips לקרוסלה אחת בשבוע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Solid deep navy. No photography. Gold CTA button with handle, bottom-left. Clean and quiet.

recommendations_for_dashboard.rendering_notes: Fonts: Fraunces+Inter (EN), Frank Ruhl Libre+Assistant (HE). Canvas 1080x1350 portrait.
recommendations_for_dashboard.next_carousels_run_suggestion: Run a counter-frame on the six-month rule itself — when paying off high-interest debt first actually beats building the full emergency fund.
